/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX26.0.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/bench_tool.dir/bench.cpp.o -o bench_tool  ../liblob_core.a ../liblob_util.a
